query:
ALTER TABLE notification_preferences 
ADD COLUMN quiet_hours_enabled BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD COLUMN quiet_hours_start TIME DEFAULT '22:00:00',
ADD COLUMN quiet_hours_end TIME DEFAULT '08:00:00',
ADD COLUMN quiet_hours_days JSON DEFAULT '["monday","tuesday","wednesday","thursday","friday","saturday","sunday"]';
